name: Low Fat Lemon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 package sugar free Jello lemon flavored gelatin
1 cup reduced calorie cherry pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with non-stick cooking spray.
2. Sprinkle half of the graham cracker crumbs on the bottom of the pan.
3. Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water and pour into a blender.
4. Add cottage cheese and cream cheese to the blender; cover.
5. Blend at medium speed, scraping down sides occasionally for about 2 minutes or until completely smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into a large bowl.
7. Gently stir in the Cool Whip until smooth.
8. Pour the batter into the pie pan and sprinkle remaining graham cracker crumbs on top.
9. Chill until set for about 4 hours.
10. Top with cherry pie filling.
